Inclusive Sports

Special | 26m 47sVideo hasClosed Captions|CC

The Onondaga Cougars and Wildcats traveled to Ithaca for the NYS Special Olympics basketball.

The Onondaga Cougars and Wildcats, traveled to Ithaca for the New York State Special Olympics basketball games. Led by Number 43 Frankie Reale and his teammates, the Cougars secured a victory against the GV Cavaliers. Meanwhile, the Wildcats, despite an impressive first half led by shooter Harry Dydo, couldn’t overcome injuries, and ultimately fell to the Commack Sharks.

10/09/2024

The Onondaga Cougars and Wildcats, traveled to Ithaca for the New York State Special Olympics basketball games. Led by Number 43 Frankie Reale and his teammates, the Cougars secured a victory against the GV Cavaliers. Meanwhile, the Wildcats, despite an impressive first half led by shooter Harry Dydo, couldn’t overcome injuries, and ultimately fell to the Commack Sharks.

THESE BASKETBALL TEAMS FROM ONONDAGA COUNTY - THE COUGARS AND THE WILDCATS -- ARE PRACTICING AT THE REC CENTER IN THE TIPP HILL NEIGHBORHOOD OF SYRACUSE, NEW YORK.

COACHES ARE GETTING THEM READY TO REPRESENT THE CENTRAL NEW YORK REGION AT THE 2024 NEW YORK STATE SPECIAL OLYMPICS SUMMER GAMES.

RICK REILLY, THE COACH OF THE COUGARS, HAS BEEN COACHING SPECIAL OLYMPICS FOR DECADES.

>> YOU GET GOLD TODAY?

>> >> I'M HERE COACHING BASKETBALL FOR SPECIAL OLYMPICS.

SPECIAL GEAR, EVERYBODY HAS A DISABILITY BUT THIS GIVES EVERYBODY A CHANCE TO PLAY AND THEY LOVE BASKETBALL.

WE HAVE PEOPLE AINGEED TO UP 47 THEY ALL PLAY TOGETHER AND THEY ALL HAVE A GOOD TIME.

I ALMOST TEND TO THINK MY ATHLETE WHO IS 47 IS THE BEST RUNNER OF EVERYBODY BECAUSE HE DOESN'T GET TIRED OUT.

>> MOST IMPORTANTLY WHAT IS SPECIAL ABOUT THIS IS TEAMWORK.

THE MOST IMPORTANT THING WHEN IT COMES TO ANY SPORTS TEAM.

>> WHAT ARE WE DOING TODAY?

SPECIAL OLYMPICS BASKETBALL.

YAY, LET'S GO!

>> I'M SKIP CLARK, WITH JACK MANNION AT BARTON HALL, A FIELD HOUSE AT CORNELL UNIVERSITY.

HOME TO THIS YEAR'S NEW YORK STATE SPECIAL OLYMPICS BASKETBALL COMPETITION.

>> THESE PLAYERS ARE GOING TO VIE FOR MEDALS, SKIP, BUT THEY ARE ALSO AIMING TO LIVE UP TO THE SPECIAL OLYMPICS ATHLETE OATH: "LET ME WIN.

BUT IF I CANNOT WIN, LET ME BE BRAVE IN THE ATTEMPT."

>> WHAT ARE YOU GUYS PLAYINGED?

>> COURT ONE.

COACH REILLY'S ONONDAGA COUGARS ARE ON THE FLOOR IN THE FIRST GAME OF THIS ADAPTIVE SPORTS DOUBLEHEADER, FACING OFF AGAINST THE GENESEE VALLEY CAVALIERS, A TOWN SOUTH OF ROCHESTER.

COACH REILLY HAS A COUPLE OF KEY PLAYERS TO WATCH TODAY.

NUMBER 43 FRANKIE REALE, NUMBER 7 MESSIAH "SMILEY" HAYGOOD, AND BIG NUMBER 24 JAY LOVE ARE A FEW TO KEEP AN EYE ON.

THE COACH STRESSES THE NEED FOR THE TEAM TO MOVE THE BALL, MAKING THE PASSES THAT CAN LEAD TO POINTS.

>> REALE TAKES THE BALL TO THE BASKET.

A GRADUATE OF SYRACUSE UNIVERSITY'S INCLUSIVE U, REALE NOW WORKS IN THE UNIVERSITY'S FACILITIES DEPARTMENT.

HE SAYS HE MODELS HIS GAME ON HIS FAVORITE PLAYER, KOBE BRYANT.

>> FRANKIE REALE GETS THE REBOUND.

GOES COAST TO COAST FOR A BASKET.

AND A FOUL!

WE'LL SEE WHAT HAPPENS WITH THE FOUL SHOT.

IT TAKES A GOOD LOOK AT THE BASKET.

HE IS UP AND IT IS GOOD.

>> NOTHING BUT NET.

>> NOTHING BUT NET.

THAT'S JAY LOVE - NUMBER 24 - BY THE WAY, AFTER A NICE PASS FROM FRANKIE.

HE BRINGS IT IN OVER TO NUMBER 24, JAY LOVE AND HE MADE IT.

SOME BACK AND FORTH.

THE COUGARS ARE NOW UP 4 POINTS.

CAVALIERS, OF COURSE, ARE DOING WHAT THEY CAN HERE.

THEY ENT UP AND IT IS GOOD.

THAT IS FROM DOWNTOWN.

MAN, THAT WAS FROM DOWNTOWN, WAY DOWNTOWN.

YOU GOT TO IS LOVE THAT.

THE CAVALIERS, OF COURSE, JUST KEEPING A CLOSE EYE.

A SHOT WENT UP AND MISSED.

BUT EVEN THE REBOUND, IT WAS A GOOD TROY TRY BUT I THINK THERE WAS A FOWL ON THAT.

THE CAVALIERS ARE AT THE FOUL LINE AT THIS POINT.

AND LET'S SEE.

ALL RIGHT.

AND HE SHOOTS.

HE SHOULD HAVE ANOTHER ONE COMING.

AND HE DOES.

ALL RIGHT.

AND HE MAKES IT!

LOOK AT THAT.

>> PURE FORM.

SMOOTH, BABY.

THAT TIGHTENS THE SCORE UP A BIT.

IT'S A FIVE-POINT GAME WITH THE ONONDAGA COUGARS STILL LEADING.

HE ALMOST THREW THAT AWAY.

OF COURSE HE IS UP AND SHOOTS AND LOOK AT THAT.

RIGHT IN THERE.

THE COUGARS MOVE THE BALL WELL.

>> THEY CALL HIM SMILEY.

>> IS THAT WHO DID IT?

NUMBER 7.

>> THAT'S RIGHT, SKIP.

>> THE COUGARS ARE PLAYING SOME PRETTY TOUGH DEFENSE.

>> SOME GREAT COMPETITION TODAY, SKIP.

>> ABSOLUTELY.

HEAD TO HEAD.

OF COURSE NUMBER 65 TREVOR MONOTONE TAKES IT OUT FOR THE COUGARS.

WE SAW THAT.

THE GAME IS STILL VERY CLOSE AND THE CAVALIERS CUTTING THE COUGAR LEAD TO 4.

>> FOUL ON THE FLOOR.

>> A FOUL.

SO THEY'RE GOING TO BE THROWING IT IN AND THAT'S NUMBER 65.

A LITTLE LAST MINUTE DIRECTION FROM THE REFEREE.

THERE WE GO.

AND HE SHOOTS IT IN.

THAT'S A GOOD INBOUND AND IT WAS UP AND HE MISSED.

>> GOOD SHOT SELECTION THERE, SKIP.

>> A LOT OF BACK AND FORTH GOING ON HERE AND NOW IT'S COMING BACK.

NUMBER 65, TREVOR MONOTONE SENDS IT OVER TO 43, BACK TO TREVOR, HE TRIED TO MAKE THE SHOT.

WENT UP OFF THE RIM AND THE BACKBOARD.

AND THERE YOU HAVE A SHOT, YEAH SO I DON'T KNOW.

WAS THAT-- I'M TRYING TO THINK.

>> 32.

>> NUMBER 32.

>> OFF THE GLASS.

>> WOW.

THIS IS A GREAT GAME.

>> BACK AND FORTH ACTION, SKIP.

>> AND A LOT OF THAT.

YOU GOT TO LOVE THAT.

HERE WE GO.

THE CLOCK IS RUNNING DOWN, I BELIEVE, THE CAVALIERS WITH THE THREE POINTER, BUT THE GAME, YOU KNOW, IT'S GETTING CLOSE.

THERE IS A FOUL SHOT.

IT'S GOOD.

>> PUTS IT UP TO 7.

>> AND THAT ONE IS OFF THE RIM.

SO CLOSE.

>> AND AGAIN SO CLOSE.

NUMBER 22 MAKING HIS WAY DOWN THE COURT.

AND PUTS IT UP.

>> NO GOOD.

>> IT GETS TURNED OVER.

COMING DOWN TO NUMBER 65.

>> AND 21... >> THEY GOT IT.

>> NOT TOO BAD FOR A 47-YEAR-OLD.

>> 47 YEARS OLD.

>> YES.

>> THAT'S GOOD.

AND OF COURSE THE CLOCK IS BEGINNING TO RUN DOWN.

>> BANKS IT IN WITH TIME EXPIRED.

>> TIME IS EXPIRED.

OF COURSE THE GAME WENT TO THE COUGARS.

WE GOT, OF COURSE, 44-34.

GREAT GAME, A LITTLE HAND SHAKE AND EVERYBODY GETS ALONG AT THE END AND JUST ALL ABOUT GOOD COMPETITION.

>> GREAT COMPETITION TODAY, SKIP.

>> ABSOLUTELY, THE CAVALIERS AND THE COUGARS.

>> COUGARS COME OUT ON TOP 44-34.

>> COACH, GOODWIN.

HOW DID YOUR TEAM PUT IT TOGETHER TODAY?

>> PASSED THE BALL WELL.

REALLY SHARED IT.

THAT'S WHERE IT COUNTS.

I LIKE WHEN THEY SHARE IT.

>> TELL ME ABOUT THE TEAMWORKOUT THERE.

>> THEY MOVE THE BALL WELL, YOU KNOW, ESPECIALLY IN SPURTS, BUT THEY DID WELL.

REAL GOOD DEFENSE.

DIDN'T GIVE UP EASY AND THAT'S... >> COME A LONG WAY FROM TIP HILL?

>> ABSOLUTELY.

>> HARD IN THE BEGINNING, BUT WE FOUND A WAY TO COMMUNICATE, TALK , TRYING TO FIND OUR MAN, PLAY ZONE.

>> HOW DOES IT FEEL TO GET THE WIN TODAY?

>> GOOD.

READY TO GO HOME.

>> AND THE WILDCATS HAVE A GOOD SHOOTER NUMBER 15, HARRY DYDO EXPECT STRONG REBOUNDING FROM CENTER NUMBER 10, TIM RANGER.

THE SPIRIT OF THE TEAM IS PROVIDED BY THE BACKCOURT COMBINATION OF NUMBER 9 CHLOE PAYNE AND OLIVIA BAIST.

>> IT'S ME, IF YOU WANT THE BALL, IF YOU ARE OPEN, SAY OPEN, I'M OPEN BUT DON'T SHOUT AT EACH OTHER LIKE COME ON, WHY ARE YOU DOING THIS!

I'VE HAD EXPERIENCE AND LIKE PEOPLE YELL AT ME AND I DON'T LIKE IT.

SO I PUT MY FOOT DOWN AND LIKE I DO NOT LIKE PEOPLE YELLING AT ME.

WE ARE A TEAM.

WE PLAY AS A TEAM.

WE DON'T YELL AT OUR TEAMMATES.

>> SOME GOOD PLAYERS.

BUT THE WILDCATS HAVE BEEN BATTLING INCONSISTENCY, WHICH HAS HELD THIS TEAM BACK IN THE PAST.

THE ONONDAGA WILDCATS ARE PREPPING FOR THEIR GAME VS THE COMMACK SHARKS.

COMMACK IS LOCATED IN SUFFOLK COUNTY ON LONG ISLAND.

SO WHAT ARE THEY DOING HERE, JACK?

THEY'RE LOOSENING UP TO GET READY TO PLAY?

YOU DON'T WANT TO GO OUT ON THE COURT AND BE ALL TIGHT, RIGHT?

YOU NEED LOOSEN ALL YOUR MUSCLES AND ALL THAT.

>> YEAH.

>> ALL RIGHT.

THEY DO THAT BEFORE EVERY GAME.

>> I LOVE THE ENERGY.

>> AND THE EXCITEMENT.

YOU CAN SEE THE PASSION AND THE DEDICATION FOR THIS GAME IN THEIR FACES AND THEY KNOW THEY WANT TO WIN.

THEY WANT TO WIN.

EVERYBODY WINS.

>> PRIDE AND JOY, SKIP.

>> ABSOLUTELY.

THAT'S A GOOD WAY TO PUT IT.

I LIKE THAT, JACK.

PRIDE AND JOY.

ALL RIGHT, THE WILDCATS, HERE WE GO EARLY IN THE GAME, IT LOOKS LIKE OLIVIA BAIST PASSES TO HARRY DYDO NUMBER 15, CHLOE PAYNE LOSING THE BALL BUT I STAS WITH THE WILDCATS.

HARRY DYDO GETS INSTRUCTIONS FROM COACH MATT.

>> GROT TO LOVE THE SHOOTERS.

>> SO THE INBOUND AND IT'S UP AND NO GOOD.

AND THERE IS A BASKET.

THE SHARKS SCORE.

HARRY BRINGS THE BALL BACK UP.

IT'S GOING TO BE INBOUND TO HARRY.

THERE IS THE INBOUND.

HE IS GOING TO BRING THE BALL BACK UP.

KEEPING AN EYE.

HE PASSES OVER TO OLIVIA WHOSE SHOT IS OH NO GOOD!

NO GOOD.

TIM RANGER, BY THE WAY TIM IS NUMBER 10, GETS THE REBOUND AND PUTS IT IN FOR THE WILDCATS.

HARRY DYDO HAS GOT IT AGAIN.

IT'S A LONG JUMPER AND HE DOES IT.

HE MADE ANOTHER LONG SHOT.

HE IS PUMPED UP.

>> LIKE 2006 VINTAGE JERRY McNAMARA STYLE RIGHT THERE.

FUN FACT ABOUT HARRY, HE WAS A TEAM MANAGER FOR THE SYRACUSE ORANGE WHILE IN COLLEGE AT INCLUSIVE U.

HE WORKED ON HIS SHOOTING WITH BUDDY BOHEIM • WHO NOW PLAYS IN THE NBA WITH THE OKLAHOMA CITY THUNDER.

NOT SURE IF BUDDY CALLS HARRY FOR SHOOTING TIPS, BUT HE DID TEXT HIM A HAPPY BIRTHDAY RECENTLY.

>> THAT'S REALLY COOL.

I WOULD LIKE TO HAVE A HAPPY BIRTHDAY.

>> PRIDE AND JOY, SKIP.

PRIDE AND JOY.

>> I LOVE IT.

ALL RIGHT.

A LOT OF BACK AND FORTH GOING ON HERE.

WE ARE COMING BACK DOWN THE COURT.

OVER TO NUMBER 10.

>> OOH.

OH, SHE'S DOWN.

>> HARRY WAS FEELING IT.

>> YEP, YEP, CHLOE WENT DOWN.

IT LOOKS LIKE SHE HIT HER ELBOW.

THEY'RE GOING TO TAKE A LOOK.

WE DO HAVE A SCORE OF 9-6, THE WILDCATS ARE BEATING THE SHARKS RIGHT NOW.

CHLOE IS DOWN, THEY'RE CALLING FOR THE TRAINER.

THEY'RE GOING TO LOOK AT THINGS.

SHE MIGHT HAVE HIT HER ELBOW.

>> HEY, COACH!

>> SHE IS RESILIENT.

CHLOE WENT-- ALSO ATTENDED SYRACUSE INCLUSIVE U AND WORKS IN DAYCARE.

>> WE ARE GOING GIVE IT A LITTLE BIT OF TIME.

THEY'RE CALLING FOR A TIMEOUT.

YOU BANG YOUR ELBOW.

WE ALL HAVE HIT OUR FUNNY BONE AND IT HURTS.

>> ABSOLUTELY.

THEY'RE TAKING A GOOD LOOK AT HER NOW.

A LITTLE REASSURANCE.

AND I'M SURE SHE IS GOING TO GET BACK UP AND GO RIGHT BACK AT IT.

IT'S JUST GATHERING YOUR THOUGHTS AND, YOU KNOW, KNOWING EVERYTHING IS GOING TO BE OKAY.

>> IT WILL BE OKAY, SKIP.

>> IT WILL BE.

VERY NICE.

THERE SHE IS.

SHE IS UP.

SHE IS BACK ON HER FEET ALL RIGHT.

SHE SAYS YES, I'M GOOD TO GO.

WILDCATS UP 9-6 AFTER THE FIRST QUARTER OF PLAY.

THE SHARKS START TO COME BACK IN THE SECOND QUARTER LET'S SEE WHAT HAPPENS HERE.

THEY'RE GOING TO MAKE THAT ATTEMPT TO COME BACK AND IT'S-- AND IT GOES IN NUMBER 42.

WAS THAT NUMBER 42.

>> IT WAS NUMBER 5, SKIP.

>> I DON'T HAVE MY GLASSES ON.

>> THAT'S OKAY.

>> BECAUSE THEY GOT TWO TALL GUYS, RIGHT?

SO YOU GOT TO GET BACK QUICK, PLAY YOUR POSITIONS.

NOW LET ME SUB BECAUSE CHLOE GOT HURT.

WE NEED TO HELP HER OUT.

MAKE SURE SHE GETS HELP.

IT'S PART OF THE GAME.

>> YOU GOT TO LOVE THAT, HOW THEY REASSURE EACH OTHER AND THE HUGS AND THE PASSION AND THE DEDICATION FOR THESE YOUNG PLAYERS TO GET OUT THERE AND PLAY A SPORT THAT THEY LOVE.

>> YOU KNOW WHAT THEY SAY, TEAMWORK MAKES THE DREAM WORK.

>> THAT IS TRUE.

THAT IS TRUE AND THAT'S A PHRASE WE ALL NEED TO SAY A LITTLE BIT MORE NOWADAYS.

>> TRUE WORDS TO LIVE BY, SKIP.

>> ABSOLUTELY.

100%.

100%.

AND THERE IS NUMBER 42.

THAT'S BYRON LEE.

BYRON IS A GREAT SINGER, BY THE WAY.

>> WHO IS HIS FAVORITE ARTIST?

>> HE LOVES TO SING THE NATIONAL ANTHEM.

HE PLAYS A GREAT GUITAR, TOO.

>> VERY PATRIOTIC.

>> HE IS, YOU HAVE THELY.

-- HE IS, ABSOLUTELY.

BYRON HAS GOT THE BALL, OVER TO 36.

36 OVER TO 40.

AND THE SHOT AND DID NOT GO IN.

LOOKS LIKE IT MIGHT HAVE GONE OUT.

>> PLAY IS UNDER REVIEW.

INSTANT REPLAY MONITOR.

>> HERE WE GO.

ALL RIGHT.

AND HE DOES!

THAT'S A LONG ONE?

>> OFF THE GLASS.

>> THAT'S BYRON.

NOT ONLY CAN HE PLAY A GOOD GUITAR, HE CAN PLAY BASKETBALL.

>> AND SING THE NATIONAL ANTHEM AS WELL.

>> ABSOLUTELY.

YOU GOT TO LOVE THIS.

IT'S A CLOSE GAME.

VERY CLOSE GAME.

TIM BENNETT, BY THE WAY, IS NUMBER 40.

HE GOT THE REBOUND, MOVES THE BALL TO HARRY DYDO WHO DRAINS A THREE POINTER.

MAN, I'LL TELL YOU, HE IS ON A ROLL.

>> THAT IS FOUR FROM HARRY FROM THE PERIMETER.

MAYBE BUDDY DOES NEED TO CALL HIM FOR SHOOTING TIPS.

>> HE TEXT HIM HAPPY BIRTHDAY.

WHY NOT.

>> IT'S A GOOD DAY TO BE A WILDCAT.

>> ANYBODY TEXT YOU HAPPY BIRTHDAY.

>> NOT RECENTLY.

IT'S NOT MY BIRTHDAY.

SOON, OCTOBER.

YOU GET TO BE A CERTAIN POINT IN YOUR LIFE, YOU DON'T REALLY CELEBRATE BIRTHDAYS LIKE YOU USED TO.

>> SOON, SKIP, SOON.

>> I'LL MAKE SURE YOU GET AN INVITE.

>> SOUNDS GOOD.

LOOKING FORWARD TO IT.

>> OVER TO NUMBER 5.

>> FOUL ON THE BACKCOURT.

>> FOUL.

>> GOT TO LOVE THE PUMP FAKE.

ANOTHER REBOUND FOR BYRON, HE IS REALLY PADDING THE STATS TODAY.

ANOTHER ONE!

>> LOOK AT THAT!

HE IS FEELING IT TODAY.

>> THAT'S HARRY NUMBER 15, I'LL TELL YOU.

HE IS DOING HIS THING.

AND HE IS DOING IT WELL ON THE WILDCATS.

>> I WONDER WHAT HIS FIELD GOAL PERCENTAGE IS, SKIP.

HE'S ON FIRE.

>> WELL, THIS GAME IS SHOWING A LOT RIGHT NOW.

HE IS HITTING THEM LEFT AND RIGHT.

SO, YEAH AND THE SHARKS ARE DEFINITELY OFF TO A GOOD START HERE.

>> I MEAN HE COULD GIVE JERRY McNAMARA A GOOD RUN IN THE 2006 BIG EAST CHAMPIONSHIP CONFERENCE.

>> HE JUST MIGHT.

A LOT OF MEMORIES WITH JERRY.

>> FOND.

WISHING HIM ALL THE BEST IN SEATTLE.

>> EXACTLY.

HE STILL HAS A HOME HERE IN SCRANTON ANY TIME HE WANTS TO COME BACK.

LOOKS LIKE CHLOE IS COMING BACK INTO THE GAME.

IS THAT CHLOE NUMBER 9?

ALL RIGHT.

SHE IS GOING TO BE COMING BACK INTO THE GAME.

IT LOOKS LIKE SHE'S OKAY.

THERE'S BYRON.

SO THEY'RE SETTING IT UP.

THEY HAVE A LITTLE PLAY IN MIND, I'M SURE.

>> THEY GOT THE SHARP SHOOTER JUST GOT SUBBED OUT.

THIS COULD HURT THE TEAM'S MOMENTUM SKIP.

WITH HARRY ON THE BENCH, NOT SURE WHO THE WILDCATS WILL GO TO FOR POINTS.

AND IT WAS UP AND IT WENT IN.

AND THE WILDCATS BRINGING IT BACK DOWN COURT.

>> GREAT BALL MOVEMENT, SKIP.

>> IS THAT A-- ALL RIGHT, THERE WE GO.

GREAT BALL MOVEMENT AND PRETTY SMOOTH.

SHOOTS IT OUT FRONT AND IT'S GOT TO BE A FOUL.

>> JUMP BALL ON THE WAY.

NICE REBOUND.

>> YES, ABSOLUTELY.

>> COAST TO COAST.

OOH!

>> OH MAN.

TELL YOU, BOTH OF THESE TEAMS... >> TOOK IT THE LENGTH OF THE FLOOR, SKIP.

AND IT'S-- HE TRIED.

DIDN'T GET IT THOUGH.

>> WILDCAT BALL.

NO INSTANT REPLAY ON THIS ONE.

>> NO.

SO THE INBOUND.

GREAT PASS.

>> ABSOLUTELY.

GOOD SHOT, GOOD TRY AS THEY HEAD BACK DOWN.

AND OFF THE BACKBOARD, THE REBOUND AND AGAIN OFF THE BACKBOARD.

>> NO GOOD.

>> IT'S COMING BACK THIS WAY.

>> WAS THAT A STEAL?

>> LATE GAME TURNOVER.

AND IT'S IN.

ONE-POINT GAME!

>> AND THE SHARKS, I'LL TELL YOU, THEY'RE NOT GIVING UP.

THE WILDCATS RIGHT THERE WITH THEM.

>> IT'S A NAIL BITER, SKIP.

ABSOLUTE NAIL BITER.

>> ABSOLUTELY.

INBOUND OVER TO BYRON, BYRON IS GOING BRING IT UP.

BRINGS IT UP NICE AND SLOW AND TAKING A LOOK.

PASS OVER TO NUMBER 10.

NUMBER 10 THROWING IT TO NUMBER 36.

>> WALL OF DEFENSE.

>> YEAH, THAT WAS A LITTLE HARD TO GET TO, BUT HE TRIED.

>> SHARING IS CARING.

YOU GUYS ARE DOING A NICE JOB PASSING THE BALL.

YOU DECIDED TO WAKE UP.

MAKING GREAT THINGS HAPPEN HERE.

>> GREAT COACHING.

>> IT IS.

HE'S GOT THEM ALL WOUND UP AND READY TO GO.

AND BELIEVING IN EACH OTHER.

IT'S A TEAM.

>> THAT LAST PLAY, YOU BROKE AWAY WIDE OPEN THAT'S BALLING, GUYS, BEAUTIFUL.

ONE, TWO, THREE, SHARKS!

>> HERE IS WHERE ALL THE MOMENTUM LIES, SKIP.

WILDCATS AND THE SHARKS.

18-17.

AND THE SHARKS ARE UP BY 1.

>> STOLEN.

>> THE WILDCATS HAVE IT.

THE WHOLE IDEA HERE, DON'T RUSH IT YET.

DON'T RUSH IT.

YOU GOT TO GO EASY.

GOT TO GO EASY.

>> FIND THE OPEN MAN,.

>> NICE PASS AND IT'S UP.

SO CLOSE OFF THE BACK RIM.

REBOUND TO TIM.

HE PUTS IT UP.

NO GOOD.

>> OFF THE BACK BOARD.

SHARKS GOT IT AGAIN.

THEY'RE GOING TO MAKE THEIR WAY BACK DOWN THE COURT.

AND HE SHOOGHTS!

AND HE IS A LITTLE BIT SHORT.

>> NO GOOD.

HERE WE GO.

SEE THE WAY HE CAME BACK AND HE TOOK A LOOK AT THAT BASKET TO MAKE SURE HE HAD THE RIGHT ANGLE ON THAT.

OF COURSE THE WILDCATS 17, SHARKS 18.

JUST THAT ONE-POINT GAME THAT CONTINUES.

>> BACK AND FORTH SWING.

>> YEP.

>> NICE PASS.

THAT'S A BEAUTIFUL PASS.

>> THEY CAN'T GET IT TO DROP THOUGH.

IT'S OUT OF BOUNDS.

>> GREAT HUSTLE RIGHT THERE.

>> OUT ON THE WILDCATS.

>> BUILDS CHARACTER.

SWING IT AROUND THE PERIMETER NICE, BACK ON TOP.

WAY TO STAY WITH IT.

>> YEP.

ABSOLUTELY.

STILL CAN BRING IT PAST HALF.

GREAT FOOTWORK RIGHT THERE.

>> TRYING TO GET IT UP IS A LITTLE DIFFICULT.

AND... >> THAT'S A GOOD LOOK.

GREAT BAUBLE.

>> WE GOT 20-17, THE SHARKS ARE ON TOP OF THE WILDCATS AT THIS POINT.

>> THREE-POINT GAME, SKIP.

>> THREE POINTS.

STILL TOO CLOSE.

>> GREAT PASS.

UNDERNEATH, COULDN'T FINISH.

>> THEY CAN'T GET THAT BALL TO FALL.

>> GREAT OUTLET PASS.

>> HE GOT HIT.

OH MAN.

IT LOOKS LIKE IT HIT HARRY IN THE FACE.

OH THAT'S GOT TO HURT.

LOOKS LIKE IT KNOCKED HIS GLASSES OFF.

HE'S ON THE FLOOR.

OH NO.

DON'T TELL ME-- YOU KNOW, HARRY HAS HAD SUCH A GREAT GAME.

>> A GREAT GAME.

SHOT THE BALL EXTREMELY WELL TODAY.

>> LOOKS LIKE THEY'RE GOING TO HAVE TO TAKE HIM OUT.

>> AND HE WANTS TO GET BACK IN, TOO.

THEY'RE GOING TO TAKE THE BEST SHOOTER OUT OF THE GAME AT THIS POINT.

IT'S SUCH A CLOSE GAME.

>> HOPING HE IS OKAY AS WELL.

WISHING ALL THE BEST FOR HARRY.

THAT'S GOT TO BE TOUGH, MAN.

HE'S HAD SUCH A GREAT GAME.

>> A WARRIOR OUT THERE.

>> AND THE SHARKS, OF COURSE, THEY'RE OWE A RUN AT THIS POINT.

>> I'M GOOD.

>> HE'S GOOD.

>> YES, OH.

>> NICE SHOT.

>> HERE COMES BYRON LEE,.

>> COAST TO COAST.

HE HAD IT.

>> HE HAD IT.

JUST MAYBE JUST A LITTLE BIT TOO MUCH IN THE WAY OF SPEED.

>> TOO MUCH MUSTARD.

>> NICE PASS.

>> THEY'RE ON FIRE.

NUMBER 4 HAS GOT IT.

HE IS MAKING HIS WAY AROUND THE COURT.

HE IS OVER TO NUMBER 10.

NUMBER 10, THEY DID IT, BALL DROPPED.

GOT HIMSELF... >> SUPERB BALL MOVEMENT.

>> THEY'VE WALKED AWAY WITH THIS, THE SHARKS ARE AT 30.

WILDCATS ARE AT-- IS THAT 20?

AND, YES!

>> IT'S GOOD.

NUMBER 35.

ALL RIGHT, YOU GOT IT TO HIM.

NUMBER 40 HAS THE BALL.

38-23.

38 THE SHARKS, 23 FOR THE WILDCATS.

>> SHARKS ENDED UP COMING UP ON TOP.

TOUGH LOSS, SKIP BUT OLIVIA SEEMS TO BE IN GOOD SPIRITS.

>> I HOPE SO.

THE COVERAGE, THIS EXCHANGE BETWEEN THE SHARKS, THE COACH AND CHLOE AND SOME ONONDAGA PLAYERS, YOU KNOW, I THIS IS, TO ME, ONE OF THE BEST PARTS OF THE GAME.

WHEN EVERYBODY SHAKES HANDS AND THEY CONGRATULATE EACH OTHER.

>> EXACTLY.

IT'S AWM FOR THE LOVE OF THE GAME, SKIP.

>> IT IS.

title: Inclusive Sports | 2024 Special Olympics Basketball | PBS
description: The Onondaga Cougars and Wildcats traveled to Ithaca for the NYS Special Olympics basketball.
